narrative: Middle East escalation and surging crude prices drive a geopolitical risk premium as USD/JPY hits a 40-year high at 163.16; 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite intervention risk. Dollar firms as US 10Y yields climb to 4.63%, while EUR/USD holds 1.1405 on hawkish ECB expectations ahead of tomorrow's meeting. Gold higher +1.14% near $4,123; equities +0.89%; DXY -0.00%; VIX 17.1. Watch ECB Rate Decision tomorrow at 12:15 UTC.
